headline: Greece’s Upgrade and ADR Partnership Could Be A Game Changer For MSCI (MSCI)
summary: In recent days, MSCI announced that its Greece Indexes will be upgraded from Emerging Market to Developed Market status at the May 2027 Index Review, while Syntax Data revealed a partnership to bring a suite of MSCI ADR indexes onto its Syntax Direct direct‑to‑index platform for financial advisers. Together, these moves highlight MSCI’s central role in how global capital is allocated across regions and how wealth managers build customized international portfolios using U.S.-listed...
